summary: POS Analytics Feature Testing Complete. All 3 backend APIs pass (18/18 tests). Frontend page loads correctly at /pos-analytics with date range picker, period selector (daily/weekly/monthly), summary cards, and empty state handling. Sidebar 'POS Analytics' link visible for admin users. FIXED: VoucherEntryPage missing icon imports (Check, Search from lucide-react) causing runtime errors - now resolved. CrDbNotesPage loads correctly with RemoteAccountSelector working.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - this is related to visual editor wrapper, not blocking functionality (known issue from previous iterations)

VoucherEntryPage_missing_imports.issue: Missing 'Check' and 'Search' icon imports from lucide-react causing 'ReferenceError: Check is not defined' and 'Search is not defined' runtime errors
VoucherEntryPage_missing_imports.fix: Added 'Check' and 'Search' to the lucide-react import statement on line 26
VoucherEntryPage_missing_imports.before: import { Plus, Trash2, AlertCircle, Save, Send, RefreshCw, Pencil, Undo2, ChevronDown, Filter, WifiOff, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
VoucherEntryPage_missing_imports.after: import { Plus, Trash2, AlertCircle, Save, Send, RefreshCw, Pencil, Undo2, ChevronDown, Filter, WifiOff, Loader2, Check, Search } from 'lucide-react';

success_rate.frontend: 100% - POS Analytics page verified, VoucherEntryPage fixed and working, CrDbNotesPage working

pos_analytics_page.sidebar_navigation: POS Analytics link visible in sidebar for admin users
pos_analytics_page.period_selector: Period selector (daily/weekly/monthly) working - changes data fetch
pos_analytics_page.summary_cards: 5 stat cards displayed: Total Sales, Transactions, Items Sold, Avg/Period, Active Cashiers
pos_analytics_page.empty_state: Empty state message displayed when no POS data exists
pos_analytics_page.charts: Charts hidden when no data (proper conditional rendering)

backend_apis.sales_trends: GET /api/pos/analytics/sales-trends - returns period, summary, data array
backend_apis.top_items: GET /api/pos/analytics/top-items - returns by_quantity and by_revenue arrays

regression_tests.voucher_entry_page: VoucherEntryPage loads correctly after icon import fix
regression_tests.crdb_notes_page: CrDbNotesPage loads correctly with RemoteAccountSelector working (2 selectors for debit/credit accounts)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data and empty state
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS Analytics feature fully tested and working. VoucherEntryPage had missing icon imports (Check, Search) which were fixed. All 3 POS analytics endpoints working correctly. CrDbNotesPage verified with RemoteAccountSelector component. React hydration warnings on DashboardPage are from visual editor wrapper - not a code bug.
